name: @epistery/files
title: Files
description: File management with Storj storage and data wallet origin tracking
author: Epistery

tools.name: files_list
tools.description: List files and folders in a directory. Returns arrays of files and folders.

folder.description: Folder path to list. Empty string or omitted for root.

tools.name: files_metadata
tools.description: Get file metadata by ID. Returns name, size, type, hash, upload info.

tools.name: files_create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder. Requires editor access.

name.description: Folder name (letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores only)

parentFolder.description: Parent folder path. Empty string or omitted for root.

tools.name: files_rename
tools.description: Rename a file. Requires owner or admin access.

tools.name: files_delete
tools.description: Delete a file. Requires owner or admin access.
